zh.lifeSummary: 當Curtis Land於1668年出生在美國維吉尼亞州查爾斯 希迪 庫迪查爾斯 希迪時，他的父親Curtis Land Sr11665歲，母親Mary Hodges30歲。他於1691年與Mary Williamson在美國維吉尼亞州素可結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1728年3月18日在美國維吉尼亞州素可阿爾貝馬爾 帕里什享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Curtis Land于1668年出生在美国弗吉尼亚州查爾斯 希迪 庫迪查爾斯 希迪时，他的父亲Curtis Land Sr11665岁，母亲Mary Hodges30岁。他于1691年与Mary Williamson在美国弗吉尼亚州素可结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1728年3月18日在美国弗吉尼亚州素可阿爾貝馬爾 帕里什享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Land
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, German, and Dutch: topographic name from Old English, Middle Dutch land, Middle High German lant ‘land, territory’. This had more specialized senses in the Middle Ages, being used to denote the countryside as opposed to a town or an estate.
English: topographic name from Middle English launde ‘glade’ (Old French land), or a habitational name from a place called with this word, such as Launde in Leicestershire or Laund in Yorkshire.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of the three farmsteads so named, from Old Norse land ‘land, territory’ (see 1 above).

variants.name: Lander
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): topographic or status name from Middle High German lant, German Land ‘land, territory’ (see Land 1). Compare Landmann .
German: topographic name from Middle High German lander ‘picket fence’.
German: from the personal name Lanther, see Landherr 1.

variants.name: Lands
meanings: English: variant of   Land  .

variants.name: Landt
meanings: German: variant of   Land   1.

variants.name: Lande
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from any of several farmsteads, so named from either the dative singular or the plural form of land (see Land 3).
German: from the old personal name Lando, a short form of ancient Germanic names formed with lant ‘land’ (see Land ).

French: topographic name for someone living on a heath, moor, French lande (from Gaulish landa ‘space, land’), or a habitational name from any of numerous minor places called La Lande from this word. Compare Lalande .

variants.name: Landfried
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Chantel.
South German: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements land ‘land, territory’ (see Land ) + fred, frid ‘peace’. This surname is also found in France (Lorraine).

variants.name: Lawn
meanings: English:
variant of   Land   2.
from Middle English laun ‘lawn, fine linen’ (French laun, from the name of the city of Laon), perhaps for a maker or trader.

variants.name: Landa
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Jorge, Jose, Luis, Juan, Manuel, Enrique, Jesus, Julio, Mario, Roberto, Miguel.

Basque: topographic name from landa ‘(large) field, prairie’. There is a place of this name in Araba/Álava province, Basque Country (Spain), and the surname may also be a habitational name from this place.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of several farmsteads in southwestern Norway, so named from the plural of land ‘land, territory’ (see Land 3).

variants.name: Lant
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Land   with devoicing of the final consonant.

nameMeanings.name: Curtis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which originated in the Middle Ages as a nickname for someone who was ‘courteous’ (Old French curteis). At an early date, however, it came to be associated with Middle English curt ‘short’ + hose ‘leggings’ compare Courtney .

variants.name: Kurtis
meanings: Respelling of   Curtis  , influenced by   Kurt  , to which, however, it is not related.

en.lifeSummary: When Curtis Land was born in 1668, in Charles City, Charles City County, Virginia, United States, his father, Curtis Land Sr, was 11665 and his mother, Mary Hodges, was 30. He married Mary Williamson in 1691, in Sussex, Virginia, United States. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 18 March 1728, in Albemarle Parish, Sussex, Virginia, United States, at the age of 60.

Il est décédé le 18 mars 1728, à Albemarle Parish, Sussex, Virginie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 60 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Curtis Land è nato il nel 1668 nel Charles City, Charles City County, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, Curtis Land Sr, aveva 11665 anni e il suo madre, Mary Hodges, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Mary Williamson nel 1691, nel Sussex, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 18 marzo 1728, nel Albemarle Parish, Sussex, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Curtis Landが1668年にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州チャーレス シトイ コウントイチャーレス シトイで生まれた時，父Curtis Land Srは11665歳，母Mary Hodgesは30歳であった。1691年にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州スセックスでMary Williamsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1728年3月18日にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州スセックスアルベマルル パーイッシュで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Curtis Land(이)가 1668년 미국 버지니아 주 찰스 시티 카운티 찰스 시티에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Curtis Land Sr(은)는 11665세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Hodges(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1691년 미국 버지니아 주 수세스에서 Mary Williamson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1728년 3월 18일 미국 버지니아 주 수세스 알브마일 파리시에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Curtis Land nasceu em 1668, em Charles City, Charles City County, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Curtis Land Sr, tinha 11665 anos e sua mãe, Mary Hodges, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Williamson em 1691, em Sussex, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de março de 1728, em Albemarle Parish, Sussex, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Curtis Land родился в 1668 г. в местности чарльс сити, чарльс сити коунти, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Curtis Land Sr было 11665 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Hodges, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Williamson в 1691 г. в местности суссекс, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 18 марта 1728 г. в местности альбемарл пэриш, суссекс, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Curtis Land nació en 1668, en Charles City, Charles City County, Virginia, Estados Unidos, su papá, Curtis Land Sr, tenía 11665 años y su mamá, Mary Hodges, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Mary Williamson en 1691, en Sussex, Virginia, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 18 de marzo de 1728, en Albemarle Parish, Sussex, Virginia, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 60 años.
